caption.full:
Tessa Blake's directorial debut 'If I Tell You' acquired by.

Suncatcher Productions has acquired the theatrical distribution rights to the family drama 'If I Tell You.' The film stars Carol Kane and Etienne Kellici and is scheduled for an August theatrical release. This project marks Tessa Blake's feature directorial debut.

What are your first reactions to Carol Kane starring in this family drama and Tessa Blake’s directorial debut?

youtube.title: Tessa Blake's Debut 'If I Tell You' August Release
youtube.description:
Tessa Blake's feature directorial debut, the family drama 'If I Tell You,' has had its theatrical distribution rights acquired by Suncatcher Productions. Starring Carol Kane and Etienne Kellici, the film is set for an August release and follows a 12-year-old boy attempting to solve a mystery.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
